PoolDataEntry.activePositions: query GetModifyLiquidity($pool: String!) { modifyLiquiditys(where: { pool: $pool }, orderBy: timestamp, orderDirection: asc) { timestamp amount } }
PoolDataEntry.volumeUSD: query GetSwaps($pool: String!) { swaps(where: { pool: $pool }, orderBy: timestamp, orderDirection: asc) { timestamp amountUSD } }
PoolDataEntry.priceUSD: query GetSwaps($pool: String!) { swaps(where: { pool: $pool }, orderBy: timestamp, orderDirection: asc) { timestamp sqrtPriceX96 } }
